LanguageData.VWE_FlyingShard.label: shard
LanguageData.VWE_Proj_FireBomb.label: fire bomb
LanguageData.VWE_Sling.description: A small pouch in the middle of two lengths of cord. Used to slingshot sharp rocks over medium distance.
LanguageData.VWE_Sling.label: sling
LanguageData.VWE_Sling.tools.0.label: sling
LanguageData.VWE_SlingRock.label: sling rock
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.description: A set of crude rock or metal shards that can be thrown a short distance.
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.label: throwing shards
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.tools.1.label: edge
LanguageData.VWE_Throwing_Shards.tools.2.label: point
LanguageData.VWE_Weapon_FireBomb.description: A small clay pot with various flammable substances inside - be it chemfuel, cloth, gunpowder or animal fats.
LanguageData.VWE_Weapon_FireBomb.label: fire bombs
LanguageData.VWE_Weapon_FireBomb.verbs.0.label: throw firebomb
